codeReview.summary: The foundation-repo-setup feature was implemented correctly. The worker verified git remotes (origin=ThewindMom, upstream=Nomadcxx), ran bun install (108 packages), ran bun run build (produced dist/index.js 614.9K, dist/plugin-entry.js 591.6K, dist/cli/), and committed the .factory directory with infrastructure files (init.sh, services.yaml, library/, skills/). All verification steps passed.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md says 'Repository: /Users/thewindmom/Developer/01_Random_Coding/opencode-cursor (forked from ThewindMom/opencode-cursor)' but also says to create 'CliCursorProxyAPI'. The local directory is still 'opencode-cursor' not 'CliCursorProxyAPI'. However, the feature description does not mention renaming the local directory, so the worker correctly did not attempt it. This is a documentation inconsistency in AGENTS.md rather than a worker error.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md mission overview vs actual directory name /Users/thewindmom/Developer/01_Random_Coding/opencode-cursor

summary: foundation-repo-setup passes review. Worker correctly implemented the feature: git remotes verified, bun install succeeded (108 packages), bun run build succeeded (dist/ output verified), and .factory infrastructure committed. The upstream remote tracks upstream/main correctly. No blocking issues found.
